content.json:
# SpyCloud Graph & AI Analysis Dashboard
**Identity Exposure Intelligence** — Sentinel Graph integration, blast radius visualization, attack path analysis, and AI-powered investigation summaries.

> This workbook leverages Microsoft Sentinel Graph (GA Dec 2025), advanced KQL correlation, and the SpyCloud AI Investigation Engine to provide deep identity threat analysis.

---

## Exposure Posture Overview
Organization-wide identity exposure metrics with severity distribution, password risk analysis, and trend data.

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| summarize
    TotalExposures = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(email_s),
    CriticalExposures = countif(severity_d >= 25),
    HighExposures = countif(severity_d >= 20 and severity_d < 25),
    PlaintextPasswords = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)),
    InfostealerInfections = countif(isnotempty(infected_machine_id_s)),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(infected_machine_id_s),
    UniqueBreachSources = dcount(source_id_d)
| project
    pack_array(
        pack("Label", "Total Exposures", "Value", TotalExposures, "Order", 1),
        pack("Label", "Unique Users", "Value", UniqueUsers, "Order", 2),
        pack("Label", "Critical (Sev 25)", "Value", CriticalExposures, "Order", 3),
        pack("Label", "High (Sev 20)", "Value", HighExposures, "Order", 4),
        pack("Label", "Plaintext Passwords", "Value", PlaintextPasswords, "Order", 5),
        pack("Label", "Infected Devices", "Value", UniqueDevices, "Order", 6)
    )
| mv-expand Column1
| evaluate bag_unpack(Column1)
content.title: Exposure Posture Summary

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| summarize
    Sev25 = countif(severity_d == 25),
    Sev20 = countif(severity_d == 20),
    Sev5 = countif(severity_d == 5),
    Sev2 = countif(severity_d == 2)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Severity Trend Over Time

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| where isnotempty(password_type_s)
| summarize Count = count() by PasswordType = password_type_s
| extend RiskScore = case(
    PasswordType == "plaintext", 100,
    PasswordType == "MD5", 85,
    PasswordType == "SHA1", 75,
    PasswordType == "SHA256", 60,
    PasswordType == "bcrypt", 20,
    PasswordType == "scrypt", 15,
    PasswordType == "argon2", 10,
    50
)
| extend RiskLabel = case(
    RiskScore >= 85, "CRITICAL - Immediately Crackable",
    RiskScore >= 60, "HIGH - Crackable with Resources",
    RiskScore >= 30, "MEDIUM - Time-Intensive to Crack",
    "LOW - Computationally Resistant"
)
| order by RiskScore desc
content.title: Password Type Risk Assessment

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| where isnotempty(email_s)
| summarize
    ExposureCount = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    HasPlaintext = iff(countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)) > 0, "Yes", "No"),
    InfectedDevices = dcount(infected_machine_id_s),
    TargetDomains = dcount(target_domain_s),
    LatestExposure = max(TimeGenerated)
    by email_s
| extend RiskScore = ExposureCount * MaxSeverity + iff(HasPlaintext == "Yes", 100, 0) + InfectedDevices * 50
| order by RiskScore desc
| take 25
| project
    User = email_s,
    RiskScore,
    Exposures = ExposureCount,
    MaxSeverity,
    PlaintextPW = HasPlaintext,
    Devices = InfectedDevices,
    Domains = TargetDomains,
    LastSeen = LatestExposure
content.title: Top 25 Highest-Risk Users (Composite Risk Score)

content.json:
## Blast Radius Analysis
For each critically exposed user, calculate the blast radius — all assets, applications, and devices reachable through their compromised credentials. Uses sign-in logs and SpyCloud exposure data to map the impact zone.

content.query:
let critical_users = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| summarize ExposureCount = count(), MaxSeverity = max(severity_d) by email_s
| top 20 by MaxSeverity desc, ExposureCount desc;
let user_apps = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in~ ((critical_users | project email_s))
| summarize UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName), AppList = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10) by UserPrincipalName;
let user_devices = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in~ ((critical_users | project email_s))
| summarize UniqueDevices = dcount(DeviceDetail.displayName), UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress) by UserPrincipalName;
critical_users
| join kind=leftouter user_apps on $left.email_s == $right.UserPrincipalName
| join kind=leftouter user_devices on $left.email_s == $right.UserPrincipalName
| extend BlastRadius = ExposureCount + coalesce(UniqueApps, 0) + coalesce(UniqueDevices, 0) + coalesce(UniqueIPs, 0)
| project
    User = email_s,
    BlastRadius,
    Exposures = ExposureCount,
    MaxSev = MaxSeverity,
    Apps = coalesce(UniqueApps, 0),
    Devices = coalesce(UniqueDevices, 0),
    IPs = coalesce(UniqueIPs, 0),
    TopApps = coalesce(AppList, dynamic([]))
| order by BlastRadius desc
content.title: Blast Radius by Compromised User (Top 20)
Applications Accessed by Compromised Users

content.query:
let critical_users = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| summarize ExposureCount = count() by email_s
| top 10 by ExposureCount desc;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in~ ((critical_users | project email_s))
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium")
| summarize
    RiskySignins = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    Locations = make_set(strcat(tostring(LocationDetails.city), ", ", tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)), 5)
    by UserPrincipalName, RiskLevelDuringSignIn
| order by RiskySignins desc
content.title: Risky Sign-ins from Exposed Users

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| where isnotempty(infected_machine_id_s)
| summarize
    UniqueUsers = dcount(email_s),
    Exposures = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    MalwareFamilies = make_set(malware_family_s, 5),
    AffectedUsers = make_set(email_s, 5)
    by infected_machine_id_s
| extend DeviceRisk = Exposures * MaxSeverity
| order by DeviceRisk desc
| take 15
| project
    Device = infected_machine_id_s,
    DeviceRisk,
    Users = UniqueUsers,
    Exposures,
    MaxSev = MaxSeverity,
    Malware = MalwareFamilies,
    AffectedUsers
content.title: Infected Devices — Multi-User Blast Radius

content.json:
## Attack Path Analysis
Correlate SpyCloud credential exposures with sign-in patterns, group memberships, and application access to identify potential lateral movement paths an attacker could exploit.

content.query:
let exposed_users = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| summarize MaxSeverity = max(severity_d), HasPlaintext = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)) > 0 by email_s;
let privileged_signins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure Management", "Graph Explorer", "Azure Active Directory PowerShell", "Microsoft Graph PowerShell")
| summarize PrivilegedApps = make_set(AppDisplayName), PrivSigninCount = count() by UserPrincipalName;
exposed_users
| join kind=inner privileged_signins on $left.email_s == $right.UserPrincipalName
| project
    User = email_s,
    MaxSeverity,
    PlaintextExposed = HasPlaintext,
    PrivilegedApps,
    PrivSigninCount,
    RiskLevel = case(
        MaxSeverity >= 25 and HasPlaintext, "CRITICAL — Plaintext creds + privileged access",
        MaxSeverity >= 20, "HIGH — Infostealer creds + privileged access",
        "ELEVATED — Breach creds + privileged access"
    )
| order by MaxSeverity desc, PrivSigninCount desc
content.title: Exposed Users with Privileged Application Access

content.query:
let exposed_users = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| distinct email_s;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in~ (exposed_users)
| where ConditionalAccessStatus != "success" or isempty(ConditionalAccessStatus)
| summarize
    BypassCount = count(),
    UniqueApps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress)
    by UserPrincipalName, ConditionalAccessStatus
| where BypassCount > 0
| order by BypassCount desc
| take 20
| project
    User = UserPrincipalName,
    CAStatus = ConditionalAccessStatus,
    BypassCount,
    Apps = UniqueApps,
    UniqueIPs
content.title: Conditional Access Gaps — Exposed Users Without CA Enforcement

content.query:
let exposed_with_sessions = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 25
| distinct email_s;
let post_exposure_signins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in~ (exposed_with_sessions)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize
    SuccessfulSignins = count(),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueCities = make_set(tostring(LocationDetails.city), 5),
    AuthMethods = make_set(tostring(AuthenticationDetails[0].authenticationMethod), 3)
    by UserPrincipalName;
post_exposure_signins
| where SuccessfulSignins > 0
| order by SuccessfulSignins desc
| project
    User = UserPrincipalName,
    Signins = SuccessfulSignins,
    Apps = UniqueApps,
    IPs = UniqueIPs,
    Cities = UniqueCities,
    AuthMethods,
    Warning = "Active sessions after Sev 25 exposure — potential cookie/token replay"
content.title: Post-Exposure Active Sessions (Severity 25 — Cookie/Token Replay Risk)

content.query:
let exposed = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| summarize MaxSev = max(severity_d), Exposures = count() by email_s;
let shared_devices = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(DeviceDetail.displayName)
| summarize Users = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 20), UserCount = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by DeviceName = tostring(DeviceDetail.displayName)
| where UserCount > 1;
shared_devices
| mv-expand User = Users to typeof(string)
| join kind=inner exposed on $left.User == $right.email_s
| summarize
    ExposedUsers = dcount(User),
    TotalUsers = max(UserCount),
    MaxSeverity = max(MaxSev),
    TotalExposures = sum(Exposures)
    by DeviceName
| where ExposedUsers > 0
| extend LateralMovementRisk = iff(ExposedUsers > 1, "HIGH — Multiple exposed users on shared device", "MODERATE — Exposed user on shared device")
| order by ExposedUsers desc, MaxSeverity desc
| take 15
content.title: Shared Devices with Exposed Users — Lateral Movement Risk

content.json:
## Identity-Asset Relationship Graph
Visualize the connections between compromised identities, infected devices, targeted applications, and breach sources. This graph data can be exported to the Jupyter notebooks for interactive Plotly/NetworkX visualization.

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| where isnotempty(email_s) and isnotempty(target_domain_s)
| summarize
    Connections = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    HasPlaintext = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)) > 0
    by SourceNode = email_s, TargetNode = target_domain_s
| extend EdgeType = "credential_for"
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Connections desc
| take 100
| project SourceNode, TargetNode, EdgeType, Connections, MaxSeverity, HasPlaintext
content.title: User → Application Credential Relationships

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| where isnotempty(infected_machine_id_s)
| summarize
    Users = make_set(email_s, 20),
    UserCount = dcount(email_s),
    Exposures = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    MalwareFamilies = make_set(malware_family_s, 5),
    TargetDomains = make_set(target_domain_s, 10)
    by DeviceID = infected_machine_id_s
| order by UserCount desc, Exposures desc
| take 30
| project DeviceID, UserCount, Exposures, MaxSeverity, MalwareFamilies, TargetDomains, Users
content.title: Device → User → Application Graph Data

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| where isnotempty(target_domain_s)
| summarize
    UniqueUsers = dcount(email_s),
    TotalExposures = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    PlaintextCount = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)),
    UserSample = make_set(email_s, 5)
    by Application = target_domain_s
| extend
    RiskLevel = case(
        UniqueUsers >= 10 and MaxSeverity >= 25, "CRITICAL",
        UniqueUsers >= 5 or MaxSeverity >= 20, "HIGH",
        UniqueUsers >= 2, "MEDIUM",
        "LOW"
    )
| order by UniqueUsers desc, MaxSeverity desc
| take 25
content.title: Most-Targeted Applications by Exposed Credential Count

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| where isnotempty(malware_family_s)
| summarize
    InfectedDevices = dcount(infected_machine_id_s),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(email_s),
    TotalRecords = count(),
    TargetApps = make_set(target_domain_s, 10),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d)
    by MalwareFamily = malware_family_s
| order by AffectedUsers desc
| take 15
content.title: Malware Family Impact Analysis

content.json:
## AI-Powered Analysis
This tab provides data formatted for the SpyCloud AI Investigation Engine. Use the AI Engine endpoints or SCORCH agent to generate executive reports, threat research, and remediation plans from this data.

### How to Use
1. Review the data summaries below
2. Use the **SCORCH agent** in Security Copilot to analyze: `Investigate user@company.com`
3. Or call the **AI Engine** directly: `POST /api/ai/executive-report`
4. Or use the **Jupyter notebooks** for interactive analysis with Plotly visualization

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= {MinSeverity}
| summarize
    TotalExposures = count(),
    CriticalCount = countif(severity_d >= 25),
    HighCount = countif(severity_d >= 20 and severity_d < 25),
    MediumCount = countif(severity_d >= 5 and severity_d < 20),
    LowCount = countif(severity_d < 5),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(email_s),
    UniqueDomains = dcount(domain_s),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(infected_machine_id_s),
    PlaintextPasswords = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)),
    UniqueBreachSources = dcount(source_id_d),
    UniqueMalwareFamilies = dcount(malware_family_s),
    UniqueTargetDomains = dcount(target_domain_s),
    OldestExposure = min(TimeGenerated),
    NewestExposure = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend
    CriticalPercent = round(100.0 * CriticalCount / TotalExposures, 1),
    PlaintextPercent = round(100.0 * PlaintextPasswords / TotalExposures, 1),
    TimeSpan = datetime_diff('day', NewestExposure, OldestExposure)
content.title: AI Engine Context — Organization Exposure Summary

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| summarize
    Exposures = count(),
    MaxSeverity = max(severity_d),
    HasPlaintext = iff(countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s)) > 0, true, false),
    Devices = dcount(infected_machine_id_s),
    Domains = make_set(target_domain_s, 5),
    MalwareFamilies = make_set(malware_family_s, 3),
    LatestExposure = max(TimeGenerated)
    by email_s
| extend DaysSinceExposure = datetime_diff('day', now(), LatestExposure)
| extend
    MITRE_Technique = case(
        isnotempty(tostring(MalwareFamilies[0])), "T1555.003 (Credentials from Web Browsers)",
        HasPlaintext, "T1078 (Valid Accounts)",
        "T1110.004 (Credential Stuffing)"
    ),
    UrgencyLevel = case(
        MaxSeverity >= 25 and DaysSinceExposure <= 7, "IMMEDIATE ACTION",
        MaxSeverity >= 20 and DaysSinceExposure <= 14, "URGENT",
        MaxSeverity >= 20, "HIGH PRIORITY",
        "STANDARD"
    )
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| take 50
content.title: AI Engine Context — User Risk Assessment with MITRE ATT&CK Mapping

content.query:
let current_period = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. now())
| summarize
    CurrentExposures = count(),
    CurrentCritical = countif(severity_d >= 25),
    CurrentUsers = dcount(email_s),
    CurrentPlaintext = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s));
let previous_period = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(60d) .. ago(30d))
| summarize
    PrevExposures = count(),
    PrevCritical = countif(severity_d >= 25),
    PrevUsers = dcount(email_s),
    PrevPlaintext = countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext_s));
current_period
| extend dummy = 1
| join kind=inner (previous_period | extend dummy = 1) on dummy
| project
    Metric = pack_array(
        pack("Name", "Total Exposures", "Current", CurrentExposures, "Previous", PrevExposures, "Change", round(100.0 * (CurrentExposures - PrevExposures) / max_of(PrevExposures, 1), 1)),
        pack("Name", "Critical (Sev 25)", "Current", CurrentCritical, "Previous", PrevCritical, "Change", round(100.0 * (CurrentCritical - PrevCritical) / max_of(PrevCritical, 1), 1)),
        pack("Name", "Unique Users", "Current", CurrentUsers, "Previous", PrevUsers, "Change", round(100.0 * (CurrentUsers - PrevUsers) / max_of(PrevUsers, 1), 1)),
        pack("Name", "Plaintext Passwords", "Current", CurrentPlaintext, "Previous", PrevPlaintext, "Change", round(100.0 * (CurrentPlaintext - PrevPlaintext) / max_of(PrevPlaintext, 1), 1))
    )
| mv-expand Metric
| evaluate bag_unpack(Metric)
content.title: Executive Trend — 30-Day Period-over-Period Comparison

content.query:
let remediated_users = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionStatus in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed")
| distinct UserPrincipalName;
let password_reset_users = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| join kind=leftouter (
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where OperationName == "Reset password (by admin)"
    | extend ResetTarget = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
    | project ResetTarget, ResetTime = TimeGenerated
) on $left.email_s == $right.ResetTarget
| where isnotempty(ResetTime)
| distinct email_s;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity_d >= 20
| summarize ExposedUsers = dcount(email_s)
| extend
    CARemediated = toint(toscalar(remediated_users | summarize dcount(UserPrincipalName))),
    PasswordReset = toint(toscalar(password_reset_users | summarize dcount(email_s)))
| extend
    RemediationRate = round(100.0 * (CARemediated + PasswordReset) / max_of(ExposedUsers, 1), 1),
    Gap = ExposedUsers - CARemediated - PasswordReset
| project
    TotalExposedUsers = ExposedUsers,
    CARemediated,
    PasswordReset,
    TotalRemediated = CARemediated + PasswordReset,
    RemediationGap = max_of(Gap, 0),
    RemediationRate
content.title: Remediation Progress — Coverage Analysis
